skills.name: Master's Touch
skills.description: Prevents your weapon from losing sharpness during critical hits.

levels.description: Prevents your weapon from losing sharpness during critical hits.

skills.name: Latent Power
skills.description: Temporarily increases affinity and reduces stamina depletion when certain conditions are met.

levels.description: While active, increases affinity by 10% and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
While active, increases affinity by 20% and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
While active, increases affinity by 30% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
While active, increases affinity by 40% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
While active, increases affinity by 50% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
While active, increases affinity by 50%, reduces stamina depletion by 50%. Triggers easier.
While active, increases affinity by 60%, reduces stamina depletion by 50%. Triggers easier.

skills.name: Special Ammo Boost
skills.description: Increases the power of bowgun special ammo, Dragon Piercer, and Thousand Dragons.

levels.description: Increases the power of bowgun special ammo, Dragon Piercer, and Thousand Dragons by 10%.
Increases the power of bowgun special ammo, Dragon Piercer, and Thousand Dragons by 20%.

skills.name: Latent Power
skills.description: Temporarily increases affinity and reduces stamina depletion when certain conditions are met.

levels.description: While active, increases affinity by 10% and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.

While active, increases affinity by 30% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
While active, increases affinity by 40% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
While active, increases affinity by 50% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
While active, increases affinity by 50%, reduces stamina depletion by 50%. Triggers easier.
While active, increases affinity by 60%, reduces stamina depletion by 50%. Triggers easier.

skills.name: Weakness Exploit
skills.description: Increases the affinity of attacks that exploit a monster weak spot.

levels.description: Attacks that hit weak spots have 10% increased affinity, with an extra 5% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 15% increased affinity, with an extra 15% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 30% increased affinity, with an extra 20% on wounded parts.

skills.name: Blast Attack
skills.description: Increases the rate of blast buildup. (Elemental buildup has a maximum limit.)

levels.description: Blast buildup +5% Bonus: +10
Blast buildup +10% Bonus: +10
Blast buildup +20% Bonus: +10
Blast buildup +30% Bonus: +10
